``` [RALPH] ✅ MISSION COMPLETE ``` ## Summary Implemented the welcome landing page plan in full and committed it to `main` (commit `11da4d1`). **Files created:** - `index.html` — semantic HTML5 page: `lang="en"`, viewport meta, `Hula — Coming Soon`, `

Welcome to Hula

`, and an `under-construction` `
` with the 🚧 icon (`aria-hidden`), "Under Construction" heading, and message. Includes the required intent comment. - `styles.css` — CSS reset, centered flex body, responsive `max-width: 480px` layout with relative units, and the distinct amber under-construction banner. - `.github/workflows/pages.yml` — deploys the repo root to GitHub Pages on push to `main` (no existing Pages workflow was present). **Verification (this is a greenfield plain HTML/CSS project — no package.json, npm, or type-check/lint tooling exists, per the plan):** - ✅ Content: `Welcome to Hula`, `Hula — Coming Soon` title, 🚧, "Under Construction", `lang="en"` all confirmed present. - ✅ HTML tag balance verified — all elements open/close correctly. - ✅ AC6 no JavaScript — 0 `
